Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Infer best explanation for bias mitigation introduce new activities CheckApplicantRace BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview Reject Approve to enforce fairness based on prompt examples like coexistence for sensitive applicants response succession non succession to avoid immediate biased outcomes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Deduce from DECLARE definitions precedence A before B succession immediate A to B nonsuccession no immediate A to B coexistence if one exists the other exists response if A then B later format nested dictionaries with support confidence 1.0

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Refinements and self corrections on activity names linking to FinalDecision or Reject succession vs precedence coexistence bidirectional ManualReview before or after decision existence for new activities preserve original constraints

Name: Validation - PE

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
